FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Aug-03-2020 Continued To Aug-17-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mercy Hall appeared by zoom for Audrey De Chadenedes (Trustee).

Ms. Hall stated that her Staff informed her that they are getting signature pages this morning and that they are trying to get the petition filed this morning. Status on filing of the second and final accounting is continued to August 17, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-20-2020 Continued To Aug-03-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mercy Hall appeared by Zoom for Audrey De Chadenedes.

Ms. Hall requested a two-week continuance stating that her office has been a little backed up, that the accounting is completed and that they are finishing it up. Status on filing of the second and final account is continued to August 3, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jun-22-2020 Continued To Jul-20-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mercy Hall appeared by telephone for Audrey De Chadenedes.

Ms. Hall stated that a complete petition is drafted, that there are a few details to work through regarding some transactions, that it's a petition for final distribution and that she is going through those transactions with her Client. Ms. Hall also stated that the Beneficiary passed away without a settlement with the Department of Health Care Services, that the bill was paid in December, and requested a 30-day continuance. Status on filing of the second accounting is continued to July 20, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Off Calendar Mar-30-2020 Continued To Jun-22-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-02-2020 Continued To Mar-30-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mercy Hall for Trustee, Audrey De Chadenedes.

The Court noted this matter was previously continued for the DHCS claim. Ms. Hall stated she got the final statement to reflect this distribution and it will be ready this week or mid next week.

The status on 2nd accounting is continued to March 30, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Feb-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mercy Hall for Audrey De Chadenedes.

The Court stated that there is an issue with the request to allow anticipatory fees, with duplicative fees from prior accountings and some fees for administrative costs. Ms. Hall stated that the issues were addressed in a supplemental declaration, addressed fees for preparation of documents by the Paralegal, stated that the time records do not reflect her (Attorney) time in reviewing the documents and that they were not administrative services. The First Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
